    "Splice made outside of an approved electrical box or enclosure",
    "Exposed conductors and connections creating a shock and fire hazard"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the circuit immediately",
    "Install an approved junction box at the splice location",
    "Re-make the splice inside the junction box with proper connectors and secure with a cover"

  "rationale": "A splice made outside of an approved electrical box violates fundamental electrical safety standards. NEC 300.15 requires a box or conduit body where splices are made, and NEC 110.14 requires terminations and splices to be properly identified and protected. This condition poses an immediate fire and shock hazard.",
